title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Panalpina India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Panalpina India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Panalpina India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Bhubaneswar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Panalpina India:
Panalpina India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Panalpina India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
